name: Flank Steak in Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in slow-cooking pot.
2. Combine Sauterne wine, soy sauce, garlic, beef broth, catsup, mustard, and onion; pour over steak.
3. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
4. Dissolve cornstarch in water.
5. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the pot.
6. Add mushrooms.
7. Turn control to high; cover and cook on high for 20 to 30 minutes, or until mushrooms are done.
